impact: This advances the PP&D plan by turning curated public HTML fixtures into source-grounded normalized-document artifacts before any live crawling or authenticated DevHub automation.
summary: Added fixture-only HTML normalization support for headings, ordered steps, tables, links, and modified-date evidence.
target_task: Task checkbox-21: Add fixture-only HTML-to-normalized-document conversion for headings, ordered steps, tables, links, and modified-date evidence.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
